payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Front-facing dark-stained wooden cabinet showing two adjacent rectangular raised-panel doors with visible wood grain and a worn, slightly scuffed finish; no handles or hardware visible and a narrow vertical seam between the doors, shadowed lighting; estimated distance ~1.8 m from the camera.
